title: Campus Interview Slot Booking
objective: Allow students to reserve interview slots for participating companies with minimal coordination overhead.

requirements.text: Students can view available interview slots by company and role.
Students can book one slot per company and receive immediate confirmation.
Coordinators can close or reopen slots in real time.
Slot booking response time should remain under 2 seconds for 95% of requests.

success_metrics: 80% of bookings completed without coordinator assistance

title: AI Resume Review Assistant
objective: Provide automated resume feedback to improve student interview readiness.

requirements.text: Users can upload resume files in PDF or DOCX format.
System generates feedback on clarity, impact statements, and keyword alignment.
Users can compare current feedback with previous revision feedback.
Feedback generation should complete within 20 seconds for files under 2 MB.

constraints: No storage of resume content beyond 30 days
success_metrics: At least 50% of users submit a revised resume

title: Recruiter Dashboard for Candidate Pipeline
objective: Give recruiters a single dashboard to track candidate progress across hiring stages.

requirements.text: Dashboard displays counts for Applied, Shortlisted, Interviewed, Offered, and Rejected.
Recruiters can filter candidates by college, role, and interview date.
Recruiters can export filtered candidate lists as CSV.
Dashboard data should refresh every 5 minutes.

success_metrics: Recruiter task completion time reduced by 30%

title: Interview Preparation Plan Generator
objective: Generate tailored 2-week interview prep plans based on role and skill gaps.

requirements.text: Students select target role and interview date.
System generates daily tasks covering aptitude, technical, and behavioral preparation.
Students can mark tasks complete and track progress percentage.
Plan generation should succeed for at least 99% of requests.

constraints: Use existing question bank content only
No mobile app changes in this release
success_metrics: 60% of users complete at least 70% of plan tasks
Mock interview scores improve by 15% on average

title: Smart Notification System
objective: Improve communication so users see important updates quickly without feeling spammed.

requirements.text: System sends timely notifications for deadlines and status changes.
Users should only receive relevant notifications.
Support email, in-app, and maybe messaging app alerts.
Notifications must be reliable at scale.

open_questions: What does timely mean for each event type?
How is relevance determined and by whom?
Which messaging channels are in scope for V1?
What reliability target defines reliable at scale?

title: Interview Risk Prediction
objective: Flag candidates who may underperform in interviews so teams can intervene early.

requirements.text: System predicts interview risk score for each student.
Provide explanation for why a student is high risk.
Mentors can view high-risk students and contact them.
Model should be accurate and fair.

constraints: Do not expose sensitive personal attributes in UI
success_metrics: Reduction in failed interviews for flagged students
Mentors trust predictions and use them regularly
open_questions: What threshold defines high risk?
How is fairness measured and audited?
What baseline model performance is acceptable?
Which attributes are allowed for training?

title: One-Click PRD to Task Breakdown
objective: Convert PRDs into actionable delivery tasks for engineering teams.

requirements.text: User uploads or pastes a PRD and receives a task list.
Tasks include effort estimates and dependencies.
Output should be editable before export to project management tools.
Generated tasks should be consistent across similar PRDs.

constraints: Must work with markdown PRDs first
success_metrics: Teams report task quality is good
open_questions: What granularity should tasks follow (epic/story/subtask)?
Which estimation scale should be used?
How is consistency measured?
What project management tools must be supported in V1?

title: Password Reset

requirements.text: Send reset link to registered email.
Allow setting a new password via secure link.

open_questions: Reset link expiration time not specified
Password policy not specified

title: Dark Mode Toggle
objective: Let users switch to dark theme.

requirements.text: Toggle between light and dark mode from settings.

success_metrics: At least 30% monthly users enable dark mode
open_questions: Should preference sync across devices?
Are system theme defaults required?

title: Weekly Usage Email
objective: Send users a weekly summary email.

requirements.text: Email includes weekly active users and top actions.
Users can unsubscribe from weekly emails.

constraints: No new ESP vendor in this phase
open_questions: Exact send day/time not specified
Metric definitions for top actions not specified

title: Autonomous Campus Hiring Copilot
objective: Deploy an AI copilot that handles end-to-end candidate communication and interview scheduling with near-zero human oversight in one sprint.

requirements.text: The copilot should instantly coordinate all recruiter interview calendars, avoid all conflicts, and keep everyone fully informed in real time with no manual intervention.
The system must automatically decide candidate readiness and trigger personalized interventions that significantly improve outcomes.
It should provide complete transparency and fairness guarantees while using historical and live behavioral data.
The whole platform has to be very reliable, highly secure, and extremely scalable from day one.

constraints: Must integrate with all existing systems
open_questions: What does instantly mean for scheduling and notifications?
How is candidate readiness defined and validated?
What fairness guarantees and metrics are required?
What reliability/security/scalability targets are considered acceptable?
